Light.effect: Create a small sustained light (torch‑brightness) for the scene.
Light.notes: No backlash risk; lasts until dismissed.

Heal (Cantrip).effect: Remove 1 Fatigue from yourself or a touched ally. Does not heal Harm.

Flame Cloak.effect: Enemies –1 die to approach; caster +1 to defense vs. melee.

Teleport (Self).notes: Dangerous tag (+2 DV). Leaves faint afterimage.

Wall of Stone.effect: Summon a 10‑foot stone wall. Provides cover; obstructs movement.

Heal Harm (with Purify).notes: Requires two actions; surcharge +2 DV. Also neutralises poison/disease.

Fleet Step.effect: Double movement speed for one exchange.

Sleep's Gentle Touch.effect: One target falls asleep (scene duration; Resist: Spirit+Resolve DV 2).
Sleep's Gentle Touch.notes: Harm wakes target. Dangerous if used in combat.

Storm's Fury.effect: 30‑foot storm cloud; lightning strikes random targets (Harm 2).
Storm's Fury.notes: Scene duration; reduces visibility. Dangerous tag (+2 DV).

Earth's Tremor.effect: 20‑foot tremor; enemies test Body+Athletics (DV 3) or fall prone.
Earth's Tremor.notes: Destabilises structures; affects all in area.
